payload.title: Role-loop verification path is too slow for small duty-loop changes
payload.summary: While verifying Task 1160, the focused TIZ command passed but took about 49.6s because it had to run work-next.test.ts plus role-loop.test.ts. This creates false stoppage pressure and makes small role-loop guidance fixes feel blocked or suspicious.

problem.symptom: Operator interrupted during verification because the small task appeared to hang or stall.
problem.root_suspect: work-next.test.ts is slow and currently acts as the regression carrier for role-loop review-duty behavior. The relevant behavior needs a smaller unit fixture or faster command-level test.

requests.text: Split compact role-loop/review-duty tests so small role-loop guidance changes can verify without running the full slow work-next test file.
Add a faster focused regression for Architect review identity path that exercises the command logic without full work-next fixture cost.
Make TIZ output show bounded progress or expected duration for known slow test files so Operator does not infer a stall.

payload.authority_note: This is an ergonomics and verification-posture ticket; it does not invalidate Task 1160's passing verification.
